title: lannea fulva
intro: Lannea fulva, also known as the Red Kola, is a plant species belonging to the Anacardiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, Lannea fulva has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions, including eczema and dermatitis. Lannea fulva can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
